livePreviews.content:
title: Popular Programming Languages Chart
type: mermaid_diagram
content:
---
```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Most Popular Programming Languages (2024 Overview)"
        direction TB
        P[Python]:::top
        J[JavaScript]:::top
        JAV[Java]:::top
        C[C#]:::top
        GO[Go]:::top
        R[R]:::mid
        JAP[Java/Scala]:::mid
        PH[PHP]:::mid
        K[Kotlin]:::mid
        JS[Solidity]:::mid
        PS[PowerShell]:::mid
        
        P --- "General Purpose / Data Science"
        J --- "Web Frontend / Full Stack"
        JAV --- "Enterprise Backend"
        C --- "Windows / Enterprise Backend"
        GO --- "Cloud / Infrastructure"
        R --- "Statistical Analysis"
        JAP --- "Backend / JVM Ecosystem"
        PH --- "Web Backend"
        K --- "Android / Multiplatform"
        JS --- "Blockchain"
        PS --- "Automation"
    end
    
    subgraph "Popularity Drivers"
        DL[(Developer Demand)]
        ED[(Educational Use)]
        OL[(Library Ecosystem)]
        
        P --> DL
        P --> ED
        P --> OL
        J --> DL
        J --> ED
        J --> OL
        JAV --> DL
        JAV --> OL
        C --> DL
        GO --> OL
        K --> OL
        
        DL -.-> "Hiring Trends"
        ED -.-> "Bootcamps / Schools"
        OL -.->

title: Popular Programming Languages Chart
type: mermaid_diagram
content:
---
```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Most Popular Programming Languages (2024 Overview)"
        direction TB
        P[Python]:::top
        J[JavaScript]:::top
        JAV[Java]:::top
        C[C#]:::top
        GO[Go]:::top
        R[R]:::mid
        JAP[Java/Scala]:::mid
        PH[PHP]:::mid
        K[Kotlin]:::mid
        JS[Solidity]:::mid
        PS[PowerShell]:::mid
        
        P --- "General Purpose / Data Science"
        J --- "Web Frontend / Full Stack"
        JAV --- "Enterprise Backend"
        C --- "Windows / Enterprise Backend"
        GO --- "Cloud / Infrastructure"
        R --- "Statistical Analysis"
        JAP --- "Backend / JVM Ecosystem"
        PH --- "Web Backend"
        K --- "Android / Multiplatform"
        JS --- "Blockchain"
        PS --- "Automation"
    end
    
    subgraph "Popularity Drivers"
        DL[(Developer Demand)]
        ED[(Educational Use)]
        OL[(Library Ecosystem)]
        
        P --> DL
        P --> ED
        P --> OL
        J --> DL
        J --> ED
        J --> OL
        JAV --> DL
        JAV --> OL
        C --> DL
        GO --> OL
        K --> OL
        
        DL -.-> "Hiring Trends"
        ED -.-> "Bootcamps / Schools"
        OL -.->

livePreviews.content:
title: Popular Programming Languages Chart
type: mermaid_diagram
content:
---
```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Most Popular Programming Languages (2024 Overview)"
        direction TB
        P[Python]:::top
        J[JavaScript]:::top
        JAV[Java]:::top
        C[C#]:::top
        GO[Go]:::top
        R[R]:::mid
        JAP[Java/Scala]:::mid
        PH[PHP]:::mid
        K[Kotlin]:::mid
        JS[Solidity]:::mid
        PS[PowerShell]:::mid
        
        P --- "General Purpose / Data Science"
        J --- "Web Frontend / Full Stack"
        JAV --- "Enterprise Backend"
        C --- "Windows / Enterprise Backend"
        GO --- "Cloud / Infrastructure"
        R --- "Statistical Analysis"
        JAP --- "Backend / JVM Ecosystem"
        PH --- "Web Backend"
        K --- "Android / Multiplatform"
        JS --- "Blockchain"
        PS --- "Automation"
    end
    
    subgraph "Popularity Drivers"
        DL[(Developer Demand)]
        ED[(Educational Use)]
        OL[(Library Ecosystem)]
        
        P --> DL
        P --> ED
        P --> OL
        J --> DL
        J --> ED
        J --> OL
        JAV --> DL
        JAV --> OL
        C --> DL
        GO --> OL
        K --> OL
        
        DL -.-> "Hiring Trends"
        ED -.-> "Bootcamps / Schools"
        OL -.->
